CREATE TABLE test_volumes (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, vol_id VARCHAR(50), state VARCHAR(20));
DELETE FROM test_volumes WHERE vol_id = 'vol-1a2b3c4d' AND state = 'available';
SELECT vol_id, state FROM test_volumes WHERE state = 'available';
SELECT vol_id FROM test_volumes WHERE state NOT IN (SELECT state FROM test_volumes WHERE state = 'in-use');

CREATE PROCEDURE delete_available_volume(vol_id VARCHAR, access_key VARCHAR, sec_token VARCHAR) AS BEGIN IF (SELECT state FROM test_volumes WHERE vol_id = vol_id) = 'available' THEN DB.DBA.AMAZON_DELETE_VOLUME(access_key, vol_id, sec_token); END IF; END;
SELECT * FROM test_volumes WHERE vol_id IN (SELECT vol_id FROM test_volumes WHERE state = 'available');
